This '''individual''' was a [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a member of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], the Gran was appointed as a member of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]], the governing body of the Order. During the Gran's time on the Council, the [[Kaleesh/Legends|Kaleesh]] [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] was revealed to be the [[Supreme Commander of the Droid Armies/Legends|Supreme Commander of the Droid Armies]]. By [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] the Gran Jedi was no longer a member of the Council.<ref name="GG" />
